title: cyclobalanus nitida
intro: Cyclobalanus nitida, also known as Cyclobalanopsis glauca var. nitida, is a plant species in the beech family, Fagaceae, native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antipyretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat fever and pain. The health benefits of Cyclobalanus nitida include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Cyclobalanus nitida is often prepared as a herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
